message:
feat(dolt): add remote Dolt server support (gt-6h68a)

Support connecting to remote Dolt servers via env vars (GT_DOLT_HOST,
GT_DOLT_PORT, GT_DOLT_USER, GT_DOLT_PASSWORD). All SQL callsites
consolidated through buildDoltSQLCmd which handles local vs remote
command construction. Passwords passed via DOLT_CLI_PASSWORD env var
to avoid CLI arg exposure. Remote guards added to local-only commands
(start/stop/migrate/recover/rollback/sync).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
